title: SQLancer aggr.subavg undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 Float64, c1 String, c2 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c2;
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (0.1, 'test1', 1), (NULL, 'test2', 2), (2.5, 'test3', 3);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c0 Float64, c1 String, c3 Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c3;
INSERT INTO t2 (c0, c1, c3) VALUES (1.5, 'test4', '2023-01-01'), (3.0, 'test5', NULL);
SELECT AVG(c0) FROM t1 GROUP BY c1, c2 HAVING AVG(c0) > 0.5;
key_bug_features: AVG function with complex GROUP BY clause
